title: anthyllis collina
intro: Anthyllis collina, also known as kidney vetch or common kidney vetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. Its roots, leaves, and flowers possess medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary issues, kidney stones, and inflammation. The plant is rich in alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving kidney function, and acting as a diuretic. The herbal preparations of Anthyllis collina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, particularly those related to the urinary system.
